# Copilot Instructions

Follow the repo SOP in `docs/operating-procedure.md`.

- Keep `main` as the production branch.
- Prefer small branch-and-PR changes.
- Preserve unrelated local edits.
- Keep `docs/repo-admin-checklist.md` current for tasks, owner actions, and launch/admin follow-ups.
- Do not assume external checks, deployment settings, DNS, analytics, Supabase, Search Console, or Vercel account state. Record those as checklist items unless actually verified with approval.
- Never commit secrets. Use `.env.example` for safe placeholders only.
